userText: I did so many exercises to raise awareness of English.
correctedText: I did many exercises to improve my English.
generalAdvice: raise awareness of 通常用于公开唤起社会对某个议题的关注，不用来表达个人提升英语水平。

issues.note: raise awareness of English 不自然。raise awareness of 的对象通常是社会问题，如 climate change, mental health。
issues.suggestion: 想表达提高英语水平，优先用 improve my English 或 build my awareness of natural English patterns。
